nasb.text: but on the day that Lot went out from Sodom it rained fire and brimstone from heaven and destroyed them all.

esv.text: but on the day when Lot went out from Sodom, fire and sulfur rained from heaven and destroyed them all—

cnv.text: 直到羅得離開所多瑪的那一天，火與硫磺從天上降下來，把他們全都滅掉。

ccb.text: 在罗得离开所多玛那天，烈火和硫磺从天而降，把他们全毁灭了。

csbs.text: 到了罗得离开所多玛的那一天，烈火和硫磺就从天而降，把一切都毁灭了。
